name: Ernesto Herbert
bio: Founder of Alkebuleum Foundation, leading strategy, ecosystem development, and institutional partnerships across Africa and the diaspora.

name: Beyan Ives
bio: Core team member supporting product coordination, operational execution, and ecosystem development within Alkebuleum.

name: Sharufa Rashied-Walker
bio: Leads global ecosystem positioning and cultural strategy, building partnerships and narrative alignment across institutions and communities.

bio: Senior strategist responsible for institutional partnerships and funding pathways, supporting Alkebuleum's grant readiness and institutional onboarding.

name: Protocol Engineering
bio: The core team building Alkebuleum’s sovereign blockchain protocols and infrastructure.

name: Advisory Council
bio: A network of advisors guiding the Foundation’s governance, institutional strategy, and long-term development.
